tools.Name: Swarms
tools.Description: An enterprise-grade production-ready framework for multi-agent orchestration that supports hierarchical swarms, parallel pipelines, and various agentic structures.
tools.Use_Case: Building scalable, complex, multi-agent AI systems for production environments.

tools.Name: RAG-Anything
tools.Description: An all-in-one multimodal RAG system that handles text, images, tables, equations, and diverse file formats through a unified pipeline.
tools.Use_Case: Advanced document retrieval and analysis for research, technical documentation, and financial reports.

tools.Name: TrendRadar
tools.Description: An AI-driven monitor for trends and public opinion that aggregates data from multiple platforms, provides smart alerts, and uses AI for analysis and translation.
tools.Use_Case: Monitoring market trends, sentiment analysis, and aggregating news across multiple channels with AI-powered summaries.
